objective: Fix latent async/sync mismatch in getStorageSettings

reason: TDD mode: write failing regression test first

content: Add 2 regression tests: (1) sync-call check proving getStorageSettings returns a Promise, (2) round-trip via updateStorageSettings proving data corruption
reason: Direct sync call exposes the Promise cast; round-trip exposes downstream spread bug in updateStorageSettings

tests: getStorageSettings returns real StorageSettings, not a Promise cast

content: Test 1 calls getStorageSettings(daoRoot) synchronously. After your fix (making it async), update the call site to use `await`. Test 2 calls updateStorageSettings then getStorageSettings — both must be awaited after the fix. The key assertion in test 1 is `expect(result).not.toBeInstanceOf(Promise)` which will pass once the function is properly async and awaited.

result: 2 tests fail, 88 pass. Test 1 fails: `expect(result).not.toBeInstanceOf(Promise)` — received `Promise { <pending> }`. Test 2 fails: ENOENT — updateStorageSettings spreads a Promise object corrupting the file path.

content: Convert getStorageSettings from sync-with-Promise-cast to properly async. Await fs.readFile inside try/catch.
reason: Root cause: fs.readFile returns Promise, .then(JSON.parse) chains it, then cast as StorageSettings hides the bug at compile time. Fix: make function async, await the read, return parsed result.

changes: getStorageSettings: sync → async with proper await
updateStorageSettings: added await on getStorageSettings call
Test 1: added await, replaced Promise check with toMatchObject
Test 2: replaced Promise.resolve wrapper with direct await
Fixed biome formatting on fs.writeFile call

result: All 90 tests pass in core (was 88 pass / 2 fail)

reason: verdict=APPROVED; 114/114 tests; FC&IS preserved; TDD cycle complete (RED→GREEN, no REFACTOR needed)
